TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Ciwidiyan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sowfungsyang ka alang Ciwidiyan. 379 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 864 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 526 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 338 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 53%, Truku 2%, Sakizaya 3%, ni rahuq na o 2%. Pusu nniqan alang Dungus bi kari"Ciwidian"o"nniqan egu bi wili". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Sowfung alang Ciwidiyan. Gasuc Gaga mniq hunac hraan hidaw nsgan Fowfung, kiyig gsilung hraan hidaw siyaw gsilung ddgiyaq, kika maa tqiri kska ddgiyaq breenux. Tiri lnglingay Breenux kska ddgiyaq. Pgkla patas cyawtung ‚óŹMgrig su na rulu Kndadax alang Skanki dhuq paru hakaw Skanki nuda igi muda(sengtaw tay 11 syeyn), mnuda alang Yeynryaw, Henans, Kanransucyaw, quri hunac tduwa dhuq Ciwidiyan. ‚óŹBasu Kndadax Skanki ppanan basu Skanki ni basu Dingtung(elug ssiyaw gsilung), quri Fungbin, basu Cngkung, mnuda kika paru hakaw Skanki, saw hari mrimal patas hidaw do dhuq su alang Ciwidiyan da. Klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Sakizaya, Amis ni kari Tlu. Snhiyan cungcyaw Pusu snhiyi Gaya sbiyaw, Joro, Teyeyncucyaw, Sengcyawhwey. Pnaah alang Plealay bi miyah mnrmux sjiqun o Bobose. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw 1.Pgkla patas saan rmigaw nsgan Fowfung. 2.Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Ciwidiyan. ‚óéNniqan saan rmigaw ‚óŹNyosan Gaga mniq senate 11 haw kungru 27 km kiyig ssiyaw gsilung. ‚óŹSkanki saan dha kksa nniqan pnhmaan hiyi qqhuni. Qnawal:03-8601090 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Fowfung alang Ciwidiyan Nyosan 1 haw. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = ¶iwidijan = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn sow*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč ¶iwidijan. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis **%, t…ĺuku *%, saki*aja *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč duŇčus bi ka…ĺi" ¶iwidian"o"nniqan …ôgu bi wili". nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan sow*uŇč alaŇč ¶iwidijan. gasu ¶ gaga mniq ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw nsgan *ow*uŇč, kijig gsiluŇč ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw sijaw gsiluŇč ddgijaq, kika maa tqi…ĺi kska ddgijaq b…ĺ…ô…ônux. ti…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj b…ĺ…ô…ônux kska ddgijaq. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč *mg…ĺig su na …ĺulu kndadax alaŇč skanki dńßuq pa…ĺu ńßakaw skanki nuda igi muda(s…ôŇčtaw taj ** sj…ôn), mnuda alaŇč j…ôn…ĺjaw, ńß…ônans, kan…ĺansu ¶jaw, qu…ĺi ńßuna ¶ tduwa dńßuq ¶iwidijan. *basu kndadax skanki ppanan basu skanki ni basu diŇčtuŇč(…ôlug ssijaw gsiluŇč), qu…ĺi *uŇčbin, basu ¶ŇčkuŇč, mnuda kika pa…ĺu ńßakaw skanki, saw ńßa…ĺi m…ĺimal patas ńßidaw do dńßuq su alaŇč ¶iwidijan da. kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi saki*aja, amis ni ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč ¶jaw pusu snńßiji gaja sbijaw, …üo…ĺo, t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw, s…ôŇč ¶jawńßw…ô. pnaańß alaŇč pl…ôalaj bi mijańß mn…ĺmux s…üiqun o bobos…ô. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw *.pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw nsgan *ow*uŇč. *.pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw ¶iwidijan. *nniqan saan …ĺmigaw *njosan gaga mniq s…ônat…ô ** ńßaw kuŇč…ĺu ** km kijig ssijaw gsiluŇč. *skanki saan dńßa kksa nniqan pnńßmaan ńßiji qqńßuni. qnawal:**-******* njusan skanki nsgan *ow*uŇč alaŇč ¶iwidijan njosan * ńßaw. pnjańßan pnatas
S.FORM: = Ciwidiyan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sowfungsyang ka alang Ciwidiyan. 379 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 864 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 526 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 338 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 53%, Truku 2%, Sakizaya 3%, ni rahuq na o 2%. Pusu nniqan alang Dungus bi kari"Ciwidian"o"nniqan egu bi wili". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Sowfung alang Ciwidiyan. Gasuc Gaga mniq hunac hraan hidaw nsgan Fowfung, kiyig gsilung hraan hidaw siyaw gsilung ddgiyaq, kika maa tqiri kska ddgiyaq breenux. Tiri lnglingay Breenux kska ddgiyaq. Pgkla patas cyawtung ‚óŹMgrig su na rulu Kndadax alang Skanki dhuq paru hakaw Skanki nuda igi muda(sengtaw tay 11 syeyn), mnuda alang Yeynryaw, Henans, Kanransucyaw, quri hunac tduwa dhuq Ciwidiyan. ‚óŹBasu Kndadax Skanki ppanan basu Skanki ni basu Dingtung(elug ssiyaw gsilung), quri Fungbin, basu Cngkung, mnuda kika paru hakaw Skanki, saw hari mrimal patas hidaw do dhuq su alang Ciwidiyan da. Klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Sakizaya, Amis ni kari Tlu. Snhiyan cungcyaw Pusu snhiyi Gaya sbiyaw, Joro, Teyeyncucyaw, Sengcyawhwey. Pnaah alang Plealay bi miyah mnrmux sjiqun o Bobose. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw 1.Pgkla patas saan rmigaw nsgan Fowfung. 2.Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Ciwidiyan. ‚óéNniqan saan rmigaw ‚óŹNyosan Gaga mniq senate 11 haw kungru 27 km kiyig ssiyaw gsilung. ‚óŹSkanki saan dha kksa nniqan pnhmaan hiyi qqhuni. Qnawal:03-8601090 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Fowfung alang Ciwidiyan Nyosan 1 haw. Pnyahan pnatas
